name: create_message
description: Create a message in a Webex room.

roomId.description: The ID of the room where the message will be sent.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent message (if this is a reply).

toPersonId.description: The ID of the person to whom the message is directed.

toPersonEmail.description: The email of the person to whom the message is directed.

text.description: The plain text message to send.

files.description: An array of file URLs to attach to the message.

name: list_messages
description: List messages in a Webex room.

roomId.description: The ID of the room to list messages from.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent message to filter by.

mentionedPeople.description: List messages with these people mentioned, by ID.

before.description: List messages sent before a specific date and time.

beforeMessage.description: List messages sent before a specific message, by ID.

max.description: Limit the maximum number of messages in the response.

name: get_message_details
description: Get details of a message by its ID.

messageId.description: The unique identifier for the message.

name: edit_message
description: Edit a message in Webex.

messageId.description: The unique identifier for the message to edit.

roomId.description: The ID of the room where the message is located.

text.description: The new text for the message.

markdown.description: The new markdown for the message (optional).

name: delete_message
description: Delete a message in Webex by message ID.

messageId.description: The unique identifier for the message to be deleted.

name: list_direct_messages
description: List all messages in a 1:1 room.

parentId.description: The parent ID to filter messages.

personId.description: The person ID to filter messages in a 1:1 room.

personEmail.description: The person email to filter messages in a 1:1 room.

name: create_room
description: Create a room in Webex.

teamId.description: The ID of the team to which the room belongs.

classificationId.description: The classification ID for the room.

isAnnouncementOnly.description: Whether the room is announcement only.

name: list_rooms
description: List rooms for the authenticated user in Webex.

teamId.description: The ID of the team to list rooms for.

type.description: The type of rooms to list.

orgPublicSpaces.description: Whether to show the org's public spaces.

from.description: Filters rooms made public after this time.

to.description: Filters rooms made public before this time.

sortBy.description: The field to sort the results by.

max.description: The maximum number of rooms to return.

name: get_room_details
description: Get details of a room by ID.

roomId.description: The unique identifier for the room.

name: update_room
description: Update a room in Webex.

roomId.description: The unique identifier for the room.

classificationId.description: The classification ID of the room.

teamId.description: The team ID associated with the room.

isLocked.description: Indicates if the room is locked.

isPublic.description: Indicates if the room is public.

isAnnouncementOnly.description: Indicates if the room is announcement only.

isReadOnly.description: Indicates if the room is read-only.

name: delete_room
description: Delete a room in Webex by its ID.

roomId.description: The unique identifier for the room to be deleted.

name: get_room_meeting_details
description: Get details of a Webex meeting for a specific room.

roomId.description: The unique identifier for the room.

name: create_team
description: Create a team in Webex.

name: list_teams
description: List teams for the authenticated user in Webex.

max.description: The maximum number of teams to return.

name: get_team_details
description: Get details for a team by ID.

teamId.description: The unique identifier for the team.

name: update_team
description: Update a team in Webex.

teamId.description: The unique identifier for the team.

name.description: The new name for the team.

description.description: The new description for the team.

name: delete_team
description: Delete a team by ID in Webex.

teamId.description: The unique identifier for the team to be deleted.

name: create_membership
description: Create a membership in a Webex room.

roomId.description: The ID of the room to which the member is being added.

personId.description: The ID of the person to be added to the room.

personEmail.description: The email of the person to be added to the room.

isModerator.description: Whether the person should be a moderator in the room.

name: list_memberships
description: List memberships in a Webex room.

roomId.description: The ID of the room to list memberships for.

personId.description: The ID of the person to filter memberships by.

personEmail.description: The email address of the person to filter memberships by.

max.description: The maximum number of memberships to return.

name: get_membership_details
description: Get details for a membership by ID.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the membership.

name: update_membership
description: Update a membership in Webex.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the membership.

isModerator.description: Indicates if the user is a moderator.

isRoomHidden.description: Indicates if the room is hidden.

name: delete_membership
description: Delete a membership by ID in Webex.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the membership to be deleted.

name: create_team_membership
description: Create a team membership in Webex.

teamId.description: The ID of the team to which the person will be added.

personId.description: The ID of the person to be added to the team.

personEmail.description: The email address of the person to be added to the team.

isModerator.description: Indicates if the person should be a moderator.

name: list_team_memberships
description: List team memberships for a given team in Webex.

teamId.description: The ID of the team to list memberships for.

max.description: The maximum number of team memberships to return.

name: get_team_membership_details
description: Get details for a team membership by ID.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the team membership.

name: update_team_membership
description: Update a team membership in Webex.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the team membership.

isModerator.description: Indicates if the user is a moderator.

name: delete_team_membership
description: Delete a team membership by ID in Webex.

membershipId.description: The unique identifier for the team membership to be deleted.

name: get_my_own_details
description: Get profile details for the authenticated user.

callingData.description: Include Webex Calling user details in the response.

name: list_people
description: List people in an organization using the Webex Messaging API.

email.description: List people with this email address. For non-admin requests, either this or displayName are required.

displayName.description: List people whose name starts with this string. For non-admin requests, either this or email are required.

id.description: List people by ID. Accepts up to 85 person IDs separated by commas.

roles.description: List of roleIds separated by commas.

callingData.description: Include Webex Calling user details in the response.

locationId.description: List people present in this location.

max.description: Limit the maximum number of people in the response.

name: get_person_details
description: Get details of a person by their ID from Webex Messaging API.

personId.description: The unique identifier for the person.

callingData.description: Include Webex Calling user details in the response.

name: create_person
description: Create a new person in Webex.

emails.description: The email addresses associated with the person.

phoneNumbers.description: The phone numbers associated with the person.

extension.description: The extension number for the person.

locationId.description: The location ID for the person.

displayName.description: The display name of the person.

firstName.description: The first name of the person.

lastName.description: The last name of the person.

avatar.description: The avatar URL for the person.

orgId.description: The organization ID for the person.

roles.description: The roles assigned to the person.

licenses.description: The licenses associated with the person.

manager.description: The name of the manager for the person.

managerId.description: The manager ID for the person.

name: update_person
description: Update a person's details in Webex.

personId.description: The unique identifier for the person to update.

personDetails.description: The details of the person to update.

name: delete_person
description: Delete a person from the system.

personId.description: The unique identifier for the person to be deleted.

name: create_webhook
description: Create a webhook in Webex.

targetUrl.description: The target URL for the webhook.

event.description: The event to trigger the webhook (e.g., created).

name: list_webhooks
description: List all webhooks for the organization.

max.description: Limit the maximum number of webhooks in the response.

ownedBy.description: Limit the result list to organization-wide webhooks.

name: get_webhook_details
description: Get details of a webhook by its ID.

webhookId.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

name: update_webhook
description: Update a webhook in Webex.

webhookId.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

targetUrl.description: The target URL for the webhook.

status.description: The status of the webhook (e.g., active).

name: delete_webhook
description: Delete a webhook by its ID from the Webex Messaging API.

webhookId.description: The unique identifier for the webhook to be deleted.

name: list_events
description: List events in your organization using the Webex Messaging API.

resource.description: The resource type to filter events.

type.description: The type of events to list.

actorId.description: The ID of the actor to filter events.

from.description: The start date to filter events.

to.description: The end date to filter events.

max.description: The maximum number of events to return.

name: get_event_details
description: Get details for a specific event by event ID.

eventId.description: The unique identifier for the event.

name: create_room_tab
description: Create a tab in a specified room.

roomId.description: The ID of the room where the tab will be added.

contentUrl.description: The URL to be displayed in the tab.

displayName.description: The name to be displayed for the tab.

name: list_room_tabs
description: List room tabs for a specified room in Webex.

roomId.description: The ID of the room for which to list room tabs.

name: get_room_tab_details
description: Get details for a Room Tab in Webex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Room Tab.

name: update_room_tab
description: Update a Room Tab in Webex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Room Tab.

roomId.description: The ID of the room to which the tab belongs.

contentUrl.description: The new content URL for the tab.

displayName.description: The display name for the tab.

name: delete_room_tab
description: Delete a Room Tab in Webex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Room Tab to delete.

name: create_attachment_action
description: Create a new attachment action in Webex.

type.description: The type of the action (e.g., submit).

messageId.description: The ID of the message to which the attachment is related.

inputs.description: The inputs for the attachment action.

name: get_attachment_action_details
description: Get details for an attachment action by ID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the attachment action.

name: list_ecm_folder
description: List the ECM folder of a specified room in Webex.

roomId.description: The ID of the room for which to list the ECM folder.

name: get_ecm_folder_details
description: Get details for a room ECM folder with the specified folder ID.

id.description: The unique identifier for the folder.

name: create_ecm_folder
description: Create an ECM folder configuration in Webex.

roomId.description: The ID of the room where the folder will be linked.

contentUrl.description: The URL of the content associated with the folder.

displayName.description: The display name for the folder.

driveId.description: The ID of the drive where the folder is located.

itemId.description: The ID of the item (folder) to be linked.

defaultFolder.description: Whether this folder is the default folder.

name: update_ecm_linked_folder
description: Update an ECM linked folder in Webex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the room folder.

roomId.description: The room ID associated with the folder.

displayName.description: The display name for the folder.

defaultFolder.description: Whether this is the default folder.

name: unlink_ecm_linked_folder
description: Unlink an ECM linked folder from a space in Webex.

id.description: The unique identifier for the folder to disassociate from the space.
